raw_consumer_statement:
Dear team, On XX/XX/year> I made a full refundable airplane ticket purchase on XXXX XXXX. The Credit Card company is refusing to reimburse the full amount saying that the ticket is not fully refundable. 

I have provided many times proof that the tickets were sold as refundable ( I have attached them screenshots of the purchase process and options selected ), but they keep on denying full reimbursement. 

I am attaching cancellation confirmation, original booking with booking code I, ticket as shown on XXXX XXXX webpage as refundable ( booking code I ). 

Kindly, XXXX XXXX
